nasb.text: That is, it is not the children of the flesh who are children of God, but the children of the promise are regarded as descendants.

esv.text: This means that it is not the children of the flesh who are the children of God, but the children of the promise are counted as offspring.

cnv.text: 這就是說，肉身生的兒女並不是　神的兒女，只有憑著應許生的兒女才算是後裔。

ccb.text: 这话的意思是：亚伯拉罕凭血气所生的儿女并不是上帝的儿女，只有凭应许所生的才算是他的后裔。

csbs.text: 这就是说，肉身的儿女并不是神的儿女，只有应许的儿女才算是后裔。
